component.name: Novyse
component.summary: Next-Gen Communications. Connect, collaborate, and communicate securely.

description.p: Own the Infrastructure. Rule the Conversation. Your communication, your rules. Novyse brings rich messaging, crystal-clear VoIP, self-hostable infrastructure, and full customization—all under your control. Made in Italy and fully GDPR compliant.
Key features of the Novyse experience:

ul.li: Rich Messages: Text, images, videos, audio, voice.
HQ Voice & Video: Opus-encoded voice notes at 128 kbps with waveform visualization.
Live ON AIR: Massive-scale low-latency VoIP and up to 4K screen sharing.
Full Offline Mode: Access all your messages and data offline, with seamless automatic synchronization when you reconnect.

screenshot.caption: The main interface of Novyse chat client
